Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Renita Mason.
Attorney Elizabeth Hurwitz for the plaintiff.
Defendant Starnisha Bryant is present.
Attorney W. Scott Tester appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of SEP-02-2014 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
